description.stringValue: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 0, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.
Once per Round, when a Friendly Unit Within 4" of this Pylon uses a Special Ability that costs Psionic Energy, that ability’s PE cost is reduced by 1.
Once per Round, the controlling player may deploy a GROUND Unit from Reserves using this Pylon base as Entry Edge. This Unit's Activation ends.
Treat this Unit’s Supply characteristic as being increased by 1 for the purposes of Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers, completing objectives, and resolving Disengage checks.

When Deploying from Reserves, this unit may be placed in base-to-base contact with a Friendly unengaged unit. Immediately remove that Friendly unit from the battlefield and return it to Reserves. This placement counts as this Unit's Move action, and its Activation ends immediately.

When another Friendly Unit Within 8" is declared as the target of a Ranged Attack and this Unit is a valid target, redirect the attack to this Unit. This Unit is eligible to make an Evade Roll against the redirected attack. This special ability remains active until the End of the current Activation.

After this Unit resolves a successful Charge action, it may declare a second Charge action against a different Enemy Unit, ignoring the restriction on Charging while Engaged. The Devastating Charge ability does not trigger a second time.
Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge resolve the IMPACT (6) 4+ effect.

RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 2 | HIT: 2+ | DMG: 3
SURGE: Armoured (D3)

RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 6 | HIT: 2+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3+1)
This Unit’s Horizontal Coherency is 4".
This Unit gains HIDDEN until it performs another action.
Resolve the PLACE (6) effect. Models placed by this effect cannot be set up within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit.
When this Unit attacks an Enemy Unit that has already been Activated during this Phase, its Particle Disruptors gain INSTANT for that attack.

RANGE: 12 | TARGET: All | RoA: 4 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 2
SURGE: Armoured (D3)

RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 2 | HIT: 5+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: -

When this Unit resolves IMPACT, each eligible model generates 1 additional IMPACT die.
This Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and select the highest result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.
Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge resolve the IMPACT (3) 4+ effect.
When this Unit is not Activated and receives Damage, the controlling player may count this Unit as Activated in this Phase (flip its Activation Marker) to reduce the Total Damage by 2.

RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 4 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3)
When this Unit makes a Close Combat Attack, if the target is Engaged with at least 1 other Friendly Unit, this Unit Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
When this Unit resolves IMPACT, each eligible model generates 1 additional IMPACT die.
This Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and select the highest result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.
Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge resolve the IMPACT (3) 4+ effect.

When this Unit makes a Close Combat Attack, if the target is Engaged with at least 1 other Friendly Unit, this Unit Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
All Weapons of Friendly Units targeting an Enemy Unit Within 4" of this Unit’s Shade token gain PRECISION (1).

Put a Shade token Wholly Within 12" of any model in this Unit. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may place all models of this Unit in Coherency, treating Shade token as the Leading Model. The Shade token has DISPLACEMENT.

RANGE: 8 | TARGET: All | RoA: 2 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3+1)

ANTI-EVADE (1)
This Unit's Glaive Cannon gains BUFF RoA (1).
This Unit's Glaive Cannon Ranged weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (2).

RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 1 | HIT: 4+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3)

PIERCE Light (2)
